system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     interFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.1;

deltaT          0.001;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.02;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           1;

maxAlphaCo      1;

maxDeltaT       1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='decomposeParDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      decomposeParDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

numberOfSubdomains  4;

method          scotch;

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    div(rhoPhi,U)   Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,alpha)  Gauss vanLeer;
    div(phirb,alpha) Gauss linear;
    div(((rho*nuEff)*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "alpha.water.*"
    {
        nAlphaCorr      2;
        nAlphaSubCycles 1;
        cAlpha          1;

        MULESCorr       yes;
        nLimiterIter    5;

        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-8;
        relTol          0;
    }

    pcorr
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-5;
        relTol          0;
    }

    pcorrFinal
    {
        $pcorr;
        relTol          0;
    }

    p_rgh
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-07;
        relTol          0.05;
    }

    p_rghFinal
    {
        $p_rgh;
        relTol          0;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0;
    }

    UFinal
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    momentumPredictor   no;
    nOuterCorrectors    1;
    nCorrectors         3;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
}

relaxationFactors
{
    equations
    {
        ".*"            1;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='setFieldsDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      setFieldsDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

defaultFieldValues
(
    volScalarFieldValue alpha.water 0
);

regions
(
    boxToCell
    {
        box (0 0 0) (0.4 0.4 1);
        fieldValues
        (
            volScalarFieldValue alpha.water 1
        );
    }
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='topoSetDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      topoSetDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

actions
(
    {
        name    obstacleCell;
        type    cellSet;
        action  new;
        source  boxToCell;
        sourceInfo
        {
            box (0.5 0 -0.1) (0.625 0.375 1.1);
        }
    }

    {
        name    obstacle;
        type    cellZoneSet;
        action  new;
        source  setToCellZone;
        sourceInfo
        {
            set obstacleCell;
        }
    }
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='g', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile

sigma           0.07;

{

nu              1e-04;

nu              1e-07;

boundaryField

boundaryField

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Current Errors

After fixing the `blockMeshDict` to make `atmosphere` type `empty`, we now have three errors:

### Error 1: `log.subsetMesh`
```
Valid patches are 5 (leftWall, rightWall, lowerWall, atmosphere, frontAndBack)
```
The `subsetMesh` command is failing because it's looking for a patch or cellSet that doesn't exist among those 5. Looking at the history, `subsetMesh` was likely called with a cellSet name argument that doesn't match anything available. This appears to be a wrapper script issue — the `subsetMesh` step needs to be called with a proper cellSet name, or it should be skipped entirely since the user didn't request mesh modification.

### Error 2: `log.setFields` — **Critical**
```
patch type 'empty' and patchField type inletOutlet
```
The `alpha.water` field has `atmosphere` set to `inletOutlet` in `0/alpha.water.orig`, but `blockMeshDict` declares `atmosphere` as `type empty`. These must be consistent.

### Error 3: `log.interFoam` — **Critical**
```
inconsistent patch and patchField types for patch type empty and patchField type zeroGradient
```
The `p_rgh` field has `atmosphere` set to `zeroGradient` in `0/p_rgh`, but `blockMeshDict` declares `atmosphere` as `type empty`. Since `empty` is a constrained patch type, the boundary condition must also be `empty`.

## Proposed Solutions

### 1. Fix `0/alpha.water.orig` — Atmosphere boundary
Change the `atmosphere` entry from `inletOutlet` to `empty` to match the `blockMeshDict`:

```
atmosphere
{
    type        empty;
}
```

### 2. Fix `0/p_rgh` — Atmosphere boundary
Change the `atmosphere` entry from `zeroGradient` to `empty`:

```
atmosphere
{
    type        empty;
}
```

### 3. Fix the `subsetMesh` issue — Skip or correct the call
The `subsetMesh` command is being invoked with a cellSet name that doesn't exist. For the damBreakWithObstacle tutorial, `subsetMesh` is typically used to create the obstacle after the initial mesh is generated. The correct approach would be:

- Ensure `topoSetDict` creates a cellSet named exactly as passed to `subsetMesh` (likely `obstacle` or similar). Looking at the current `topoSetDict`, it creates `obstacleCell` (cellSet) and `obstacle` (cellZone). If the script calls `subsetMesh obstacle`, that won't work because `obstacle` is a **cellZone**, not a **cellSet**. Either:
  - Rename `obstacleCell` to something else, or change the `subsetMesh` invocation to target the correct cellSet.
  - Or better yet, remove the `subsetMesh` step entirely if no cellSet name is specified in the workflow, since the obstacle is already created via `topoSetDict` → `setFields` pipeline.

Alternatively, check the actual `subsetMesh` command invocation and ensure it references a valid cellSet name (e.g., `obstacleCell`), and that the command syntax is correct for this OpenFOAM version.

---

## Summary

The core fix across all `0/` files and `blockMeshDict` is ensuring **complete consistency** between the mesh patch declarations and the boundary field types in initial condition files. Specifically, the `atmosphere` patch must be declared as `type empty` in `blockMeshDict` AND all fields (`U`, `alpha.water`, `p_rgh`) must use `type empty` for their `atmosphere` boundary condition. Additionally, the `subsetMesh` invocation needs to reference a valid cellSet name that exists after `topoSetDict` processing.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Change atmosphere patch type from empty to wall and add a face using vertices 2 3 7 6 so that atmosphere becomes a valid wall patch with one face; alternatively if keeping empty is preferred, keep as empty but this must be consistent with boundary conditions'}, {'file': '0/U.orig', 'changes': 'Keep atmosphere as empty since blockMeshDict will be changed to match'}, {'file': '0/alpha.water.orig', 'changes': 'Keep atmosphere as inletOutlet since blockMeshDict will be changed to match - actually this is wrong, need to reconsider; the atmosphere boundary must be consistent with the physical setup where waves develop and propagate into the atmosphere so inletOutlet is appropriate; however if blockMeshDict forces empty then the boundary condition must be changed to empty; but empty type cannot have inletValue etc; so instead I will change blockMeshDict to make atmosphere a wall patch'}, {'file': '0/p_rgh', 'changes': 'Keep atmosphere as fixedFluxPressure since blockMeshDict will be changed to make it a wall'}, {'file': 'system/topoSetDict', 'changes': 'Rename the cellSet name from obstacleCell to obstacle so that if subsetMesh is called with obstacle it finds the correct cellSet; alternatively the subsetMesh command should be called with obstacleCell; check what the actual subsetMesh command expects'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar dam break with obstacle simulation. user interfoam solver. The domain extent is 1x1x1. Use 32 grid points in all directions. Use density of air to be 1 kg/m3 and density of water to be 1000 kg/m3. Take the viscosity of air to be 0.0001 and viscosity of water to be 0.001. The simulation runs from t=0s to t=0.1s with a timestep of 0.001s and a write interval of 0.02.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
